description: CompositionBue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck and a velvet tape on the neck inseam, has short sleeves and superman graphic on the front FitRegular Wash careHand wash with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsIf you're a fan of comics, and especially superman, then this range of t-shirts is the perfect choice for you. The vibrant blue colour and graphics transport you to your childhood dreams while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh all day. Pair this with jeans or shorts.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
